pin_definitions.description: Positive supply input. Connect the VCC pin to the positive voltage rail.
High voltage auxiliary input. VCC with respect to VEE is measured by connecting the VAUXH pin to the VCC rail.
No connect. This pin is not internally connected and should not be connected to any signal or power rail.
MOSFET gate control signal for fault control of the output. The GATE pin is clamped to VEE through a 12.6V internal zener diode.
Under-voltage lockout threshold input. Connecting the UVLO pin to a resistor divider from VCC to VEE will set the under-voltage lockout threshold.
Over-voltage lockout threshold input. Connecting the OVLO pin to a resistor divider from VCC to VEE will set the over-voltage lockout threshold.
Current limit and power limit sense input. SENSE provides a direct connection to the MOSFET source and current sense resistor voltage.
Current telemetry Kelvin sense positive input. SENSE_K is the positive input to a precision differential current sense amplifier.
Current telemetry Kelvin sense negative input. The VEE_K pin is the negative input to a precision differential current sense amplifier.
Negative supply input. Connect the VEE pin to the negative voltage supply rail.
SMBus data input. The SDAI pin is designed to read PMBus commands using the SMBus communication protocol.
SMBus data output. The SDAO pin is designed to transmit PMBus commands using the SMBus communication protocol.
SMBus clock input.
SMBus alert. This pin is connected to an open drain MOSFET which pulls the pin to VEE if a fault is detected.
Internal ADC reference output. Connect a 1 µF capacitor from the VREF pin to VEE to filter noise.
Positive diode sense. The DIODE pin should be connected to the anode of a diode whose cathode is connected to VEE for temperature monitoring.
Auxiliary pin allows voltage telemetry from an external source. Full scale input of 2.97V.
Address pin 2. The address pins can be connected to VDD, VEE, or left open to set the PMBus address.
Address pin 1. The address pins can be connected to VDD, VEE, or left open to set the PMBus address.
Address pin 0. The address pins can be connected to VDD, VEE, or left open to set the PMBus address.
Internal 4.9V sub-regulator output. VDD must be connected and closely coupled to VEE through a 1 µF ceramic bypass capacitor.
Current limit threshold input. The LM5064 detects current limit events by sensing the voltage across a series resistor.
Retry selection pin. Connecting RETRY to VDD sets the LM5064 to lockout after a fault. Connecting to VEE sets it to retry.
Timing input. Set the insertion time delay and the fault timeout period by connecting a capacitor from the TIMER pin to VEE.
Power limit input. Connecting a resistor from PWR to VEE sets the maximum power dissipation allowed in the external MOSFET switch.
Output voltage sense input. The OUT pin is used to sense the output voltage and calculate the power across the MOSFET switch.
No connect. This pin is not internally connected and should not be connected to any signal or power rail.
Power good monitor output. Open-drain output pulls low during over-current, UVLO, and OVLO.
Exposed pad. Connect to PCB VEE plane using multiple thermal vias.

logical_pins.name: VCC
logical_pins.description: Positive supply input. Connect the VCC pin to the positive voltage rail.

logical_pins.name: VAUXH
logical_pins.description: High voltage auxiliary input. VCC with respect to VEE is measured by connecting the VAUXH pin to the VCC rail.

logical_pins.name: NC
logical_pins.description: No connect. This pin is not internally connected and should not be connected to any signal or power rail.

logical_pins.name: GATE
logical_pins.description: MOSFET gate control signal for fault control of the output. The GATE pin is clamped to VEE through a 12.6V internal zener diode.

logical_pins.name: UVLO/EN
logical_pins.description: Under-voltage lockout threshold input. Connecting the UVLO pin to a resistor divider from VCC to VEE will set the under-voltage lockout threshold.

logical_pins.name: OVLO
logical_pins.description: Over-voltage lockout threshold input. Connecting the OVLO pin to a resistor divider from VCC to VEE will set the over-voltage lockout threshold.

logical_pins.name: SENSE
logical_pins.description: Current limit and power limit sense input. SENSE provides a direct connection to the MOSFET source and current sense resistor voltage.

logical_pins.name: SENSE_K
logical_pins.description: Current telemetry Kelvin sense positive input. SENSE_K is the positive input to a precision differential current sense amplifier.

logical_pins.name: VEE_K
logical_pins.description: Current telemetry Kelvin sense negative input. The VEE_K pin is the negative input to a precision differential current sense amplifier.

logical_pins.name: VEE
logical_pins.description: Negative supply input. Connect the VEE pin to the negative voltage supply rail.

logical_pins.name: SDAI
logical_pins.description: SMBus data input. The SDAI pin is designed to read PMBus commands using the SMBus communication protocol.

logical_pins.name: SDAO
logical_pins.description: SMBus data output. The SDAO pin is designed to transmit PMBus commands using the SMBus communication protocol.

logical_pins.name: SCL
logical_pins.description: SMBus clock input.

logical_pins.name: SMBA
logical_pins.description: SMBus alert. Open drain MOSFET which pulls the pin to VEE if a fault is detected.

logical_pins.name: VREF
logical_pins.description: Internal ADC reference output. Connect a 1 µF capacitor from the VREF pin to VEE.

logical_pins.name: DIODE
logical_pins.description: Positive diode sense. Connected to the anode of an external diode for temperature monitoring.

logical_pins.name: VAUX
logical_pins.description: Auxiliary pin allows voltage telemetry from an external source. Full scale input of 2.97V.

logical_pins.name: ADR2
logical_pins.description: Address pin 2. Can be connected to VDD, VEE, or left open to set the PMBus address.

logical_pins.name: ADR1
logical_pins.description: Address pin 1. Can be connected to VDD, VEE, or left open to set the PMBus address.

logical_pins.name: ADR0
logical_pins.description: Address pin 0. Can be connected to VDD, VEE, or left open to set the PMBus address.

logical_pins.name: VDD
logical_pins.description: Internal 4.9V sub-regulator output. Connect to VEE through a 1 µF ceramic bypass capacitor.

logical_pins.name: CL
logical_pins.description: Current limit threshold input. Set to 26 mV by connecting to VDD and 50 mV when connected to VEE.

logical_pins.name: RETRY
logical_pins.description: Retry selection pin. Connect to VDD for lockout or VEE for retry after a fault.

logical_pins.name: TIMER
logical_pins.description: Timing input. Set insertion time delay and fault timeout period by connecting a capacitor to VEE.

logical_pins.name: PWR
logical_pins.description: Power limit input. Connecting a resistor from PWR to VEE sets the maximum power dissipation allowed in the external MOSFET.

logical_pins.name: OUT
logical_pins.description: Output voltage sense input. Used to sense output voltage and calculate power across the MOSFET.

logical_pins.name: PGD
logical_pins.description: Power good monitor output. Open-drain output pulls low during over-current, UVLO, and OVLO.

logical_pins.name: EP
logical_pins.description: Exposed pad. Connect to PCB VEE plane using multiple thermal vias.
